name: roughViz

en.when_to_use: Use it when you want an intentionally hand-drawn, hoverable exploratory chart with stable layout instead of hand-writing jittered SVG, which fails at consistent rough paths, axes, collision handling, and tooltip geometry. Do not use it for formal reports or a static single bar, line, or pie chart.
en.why_valuable: AI can only add random jitter to ordinary SVG; it cannot rebuild bars, arcs, axes, and hit layers consistently at the same roughness. roughViz combines a hand-drawn personality with real chart scales so decorative noise does not damage the data geometry.

data_in.note: This entry accepts only the six upstream constructors that can directly consume in-memory JSON. Line/Network/Force have separate URL or graph-structure constraints and are excluded from this trimmed schema. boot injects element as a CSS id selector.

schema.labelKey?: string -- required for StackedBar and points to each row's category field; ignored by other types

options?.fillWeight?: number -- defaults to 0.5 for bars/scatter and 0.85 for pie/donut
options?.font?: 0 | 1 | 'gaegu' | 'indie flower' | CSS font-family string -- defaults to the embedded Gaegu font
options?.colors?: CSS color string[] | CSS color string -- defaults to the upstream ten-color palette
options?.color?: CSS color string -- Bar/BarH defaults to 'skyblue'
options?.xLabel?: string -- defaults to an empty string
options?.yLabel?: string -- defaults to an empty string

spec.note: roughViz fixes width/height into the SVG viewBox and coordinate scales at construction. boot measures a pixel width and explicitly passes a height of 400px. On resize, destroy the DOM and rebuild; iron rule 3 forbids vh and percentage heights.

when_to_use: 需要刻意手绘感、可悬停且版式稳定的探索图时用它而非手写抖动 SVG,因为原生在一致的 rough path、坐标轴、碰撞与 tooltip 几何上失败;正式报告或静态单一柱线饼非做它。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能给普通 SVG 加随机抖动,做不到同一 roughness 下稳定重建柱、弧、坐标轴和命中层;roughViz 把手绘人格与真实图表尺度结合,避免装饰性噪声破坏数据几何。

data_in.note: 本条只收上游可直接吃内存 JSON 的六类构造器;Line/Network/Force 的输入分支另有 URL/图结构约束,不在这个裁剪 schema 内。element 由 boot 注入 CSS id 定位器。

schema.labelKey?: string —— StackedBar 必填,指向每行的类别字段;其他类型忽略

options?.fillWeight?: number —— 柱/散点默认 0.5,饼/环默认 0.85
options?.font?: 0 | 1 | 'gaegu' | 'indie flower' | CSS font-family string —— 默认 Gaegu 内嵌字体
options?.colors?: CSS color string[] | CSS color string —— 默认上游十色调色板
options?.color?: CSS color string —— Bar/BarH 默认 'skyblue'

spec.note: roughViz 在构造时把 width/height 固化进 SVG viewBox 与坐标尺度;boot 默认量取像素宽并显式传高 400px。尺寸变化应销毁 DOM 后重建,铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。

boot.widget: unsupported: roughViz@2.0.5 只接受 document 级 CSS 定位器,并用 document.querySelector/document.getElementById 找挂载点与内部 SVG;它看不见 shadowRoot 子树,不能满足铁律 2。

example._why: 构造器名与三种内存数据形状是判别联合,minimal example 明确 Bar 的 labels/values 必须同层且等长。

uplink: display/local-interact 类,默认无需上行。若需把图元悬停或点击交给宿主,由消费 AI 自行接原生 DOM 并按载体处理;本条不建立统一事件协议。

carriers.widget: unsupported:文档级定位器与内部 document.getElementById 无法定位 shadowRoot 内节点
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + SVG,内嵌字体 data URL,无外部 CSS 或默认上行依赖

isolation.evidence: rough-viz@2.0.5 +esm: injects a <style type='text/css'> containing @font-face (hand-drawn Gaegu/Indie-Flower fonts as base64 data URLs; @font-face x2, fontFamily x40). document.body x2 used as a transient getBBox text-measurement node (self.document.body.appendChild(n) then removeChild(n)); chart tooltips go inside this.el (select(this.el).select('.tooltip').remove()), not body. addEventListener('resize', this.resizeHandler.bind(this)) — window resize listener with inline .bind(this) (ref not cleanly removable -> leak risk). Mount + internal SVG resolved via document.getElementById x9 / document.querySelector x2 -> cannot see shadow-root subtrees, so shadow-incompatible (matches widget=unsupported).
